title: Working Group 2.5 'Post-Quantum Cryptographic Mechanisms' (TC26 structure)
summary: Structure page of TC26, the Rosstandart Technical Committee for Standardization 'Cryptographic Information Protection', listing Working Group 2.5 'Постквантовые криптографические механизмы' (Post-Quantum Cryptographic Mechanisms) under Subcommittee No. 2. Documents the official national standards body's dedicated post-quantum cryptography standardization track, intended to complement the GOST R 34 series.

title: Standardization documents of TC26 (national cryptographic standards index)
summary: Index maintained by TC26 of Russian cryptographic standardization documents (national GOST R 34 standards, recommendations, technical specifications) developed by the committee. The body whose Working Group 2.5 is developing post-quantum signature and key-encapsulation standards to extend the GOST R 34 family; no adopted national PQC standard is published as of June 2026.

title: Научно-исследовательские работы (research-works registry, incl. НИР "Кульминация": методика выбора постквантовых механизмов на основе помехоустойчивого кодирования)
issuingOrg: АНО НТЦ ЦК (National Technology Center for Digital Cryptography)
summary: Official research-works registry of the National Technology Center for Digital Cryptography (АНО НТЦ ЦК, established under Mintsifry/Minpromtorg/FSB oversight), listing НИР "Кульминация" (2024, registered 04.07.2025): "Формирование методики и автоматизированных инструментов выбора постквантовых механизмов, основанных на помехоустойчивом кодировании", providing parameter-selection recommendations for the Russian post-quantum schemes Кодиеум and Шиповник being standardised in TC26. Documents domestic institutional capacity-building on code-based post-quantum cryptography.
